components.name: Order Item
components.description: List item row for orders — Avatar leading, customer name + order ID + time, trailing amount + status badge. Maps to <ListItem type="order">.

examples.name: Values
examples.description: Image avatar and fallback initials variants.

bestPractices.do: Use Image value when avatar URL is available, Fallback when not.
bestPractices.dont: Show all items with the same value — real lists have visual variety.

keyboard.action: Move focus to the list item

notes: Ensure accessible name via title prop.

related.name: Item List
related.desc: Parent container for Order Item rows.

components.name: Product Item
components.description: List item row for products — Thumbnail image leading, product name + sales + price, trailing growth arrow. Maps to <ListItem type="product">.

examples.name: Values
examples.description: Default, Star (top product), and Negative growth variants.

bestPractices.do: Use Star for top-selling products, Negative for declining ones.
bestPractices.dont: Show all products with the same growth direction.

keyboard.action: Move focus to the list item

notes: Product name serves as accessible label.

components.name: User Item
components.description: List item row for users — Avatar leading, user name + email, trailing role + status badges. Maps to <ListItem type="user">.

examples.name: Values
examples.description: Image avatar and fallback initials variants.

bestPractices.do: Use Image when user has profile photo, Fallback for users without.
bestPractices.dont: Mix user items with order items in the same list.

keyboard.action: Move focus to the list item

notes: User name serves as accessible label.

components.name: Transaction Item
components.description: List item row for transactions — Thumbnail icon leading, transaction title + subtitle, trailing amount + time. Maps to <ListItem type="transaction">.

bestPractices.do: Match amount sign with Value variant — positive for incoming, negative for refunds.
bestPractices.dont: Use success color for negative amounts.

keyboard.action: Move focus to the list item

notes: Transaction title serves as accessible label.

components.name: Notification Item
components.description: List item row for notifications — Thumbnail icon leading with optional unread dot, title + description + time stacked, dismiss button on hover. Maps to <ListItem type="notification">.

examples.name: Values
examples.description: Unread (with blue dot + primary-10 bg) and Read notification variants.

props.name: category
props.description: Thumbnail color category (order→Primary, warning→Warning, success→Success, info→Default)

props.name: onDismiss
props.description: Dismiss handler — shows close button on hover

bestPractices.do: Use Unread for new notifications, Read for acknowledged ones.
bestPractices.dont: Show all notifications as unread — users expect a mix.

bestPractices.do: Map category to Thumbnail color: order→Primary, warning→Warning, success→Success, info→Default.
bestPractices.dont: Use the same Thumbnail color for all notification types.

figmaMapping.value: Blue dot + semibold title + primary-10 bg
No dot + medium title + no bg

keyboard.action: Move focus to the list item

notes: Notification title serves as accessible label.
Unread dot is decorative — use aria attributes for screen reader notification count.

Content.Title: Low stock alert
Content.Description: MacBook Pro 14" has only 12 units left

examples.title: Order List
examples.preview: 4 recent orders with avatar, ID, time, amount, status badge

examples.title: Notification Center
examples.preview: Mix of unread and read notifications with category icons

props.name: Type
props.desc: Determines which item type fills the list.

designTokens.usage: No gap between items — each item provides its own padding.
No border radius — container is structural, not decorative.
